attributes.Sql Query:
/* ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18  XAAS NGC-CRM CHANGE */

SELECT                                                                                  
 MTDNBT.DRVD_XAAS_BKGS_KEY                             AS DRVD_NCR_BKG_MTDNBT_KEY /* Modified as part of OM LSS project*/
,MTDNBT.TRANSACTION_DATETIME                                                                 AS TRANSACTION_DTM
,MTDNBT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT
,'OPL'                                                      AS SS_CD
,MTDNBT.PROCESS_DATE                                                                      AS PROCESS_DT
,CAST(MTDNBT.BOOKING_PCT     AS DECIMAL(18,6))                                              AS BOOKINGS_PCT        
 ,CAST(MTDNBT.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT AS DECIMAL(18,6))                                                                              AS SPLIT_PCT     
 ,0.00                                                                      AS TRADE_IN_AMT          
 ,MTDNBT.SALES_REP_NUMBER                                                           AS DD_AH_BK_SALES_REP_NUM               
 ,MTDNBT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE                                                               AS DD_AH_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD 
 ,NKM.RMA_FLG                                                                       AS DD_AH_RMA_FLG
,CAST(100-MTDNBT.BOOKING_PCT AS  DECIMAL(18,6))                                                        AS DV_AH_BKG_PCT
,MTDNBT.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG                                               AS DV_AH_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG                               
 ,MTDNBT.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG                                    AS DV_AH_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG                   
 ,MTDNBT.REVENUE_FLG                                                                             AS  DV_AH_REVENUE_FLG
,MTDNBT.OVERLAY_FLG                                                                              AS DD_AH_OVERLAY_FLG
,MTDNBT.IC_REVENUE_FLG                                                         AS DV_AH_IC_REVENUE_FLG      
 ,MTDNBT.CHARGES_FLG                                                                                 AS DV_AH_CHARGES_FLG
,MTDNBT.MISC_FLG                                                                        AS DV_AH_MISC_FLG
,MTDNBT.ACQUISITION_FLG                                                        AS DV_AH_ACQUISITION_FLG    
 ,MTDNBT.SERVICE_FLG                                                                                      AS DV_AH_SERVICE_FLG
,MTDNBT.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG                                                           AS DD_AH_CORP_BKG_FLAG      
 ,MTDNBT.CANCELLED_FLG                                                                                  AS DD_AH_CANCELLED_FLG
,MTDNBT.DV_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT                                        AS DV_AH_COMP_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT                              
 ,MTDNBT.DV_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT                                       AS DV_AH_COMP_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT                              
 ,MTDNBT.DV_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMT                                         AS DV_AH_COMP_COST_USD_AMT                         
 ,MTDNBT.DV_EXTENDED_HOLD_QTY                                   AS DV_AH_EXTENDED_QTY                         
 ,MTDNBT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                                                        AS DD_AH_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
 ,MTDNBT. DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD AS    DD_AH_MTDNBTL_CURRENCY_CD     
 ,NKM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT                    AS DD_AH_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT                                 
 ,MTDNBT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT                                                                      
 ,MTDNBT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT                                                                          
 ,'Fiscal Year'                                                       AS BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD    /* Modified as part of OM LSS project. this column is not present in MT_DRVD_XAAS_BKGS_MTDNBT_NRT. Hence defaulting*/
,MTDNBT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT                                                                          
 ,NKM.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY                                                                                
 ,MTDNBT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                                                  AS DD_AH_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY     
 ,MTDNBT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                                                   AS DD_AH_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      
 ,MTDNBT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                                                                AS DD_AH_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    
 ,NKM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY                                                        AS DD_AH_END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
 /*,NKM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY                                                                        */
,-999  AS   PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,MTDNBT.PRODUCT_KEY                                                                        AS DD_AH_PRODUCT_KEY
,NKM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,USER                                                                                                                                                                    AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  )      AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER                                                                                                                                                                    AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  )      AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,MTDNBT.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG       /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
 ,MTDNBT.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG              /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
 ,MTDNBT.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
 ,MTDNBT.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
 ,NKM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
 ,MTDNBT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  
,MTDNBT.POB_TYPE_CD
,MTDNBT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG 
 ,NULL                                                                                                                                                                    AS ACTION_CODE
,'='      AS DML_TYPE
/*  ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18 */
 
,MTDNBT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   
 ,MTDNBT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
/* END Q2FY18 XAAS */
 
FROM  $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_XAAS_BKGS_TRX_NRT  MTDNBT                                                      /* Modified as part of OM LSS project*/                             
                                 CROSS JOIN                                                        
                                 (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$CTLDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD') DJS
                                 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NKM                                                        
                                 ON  MTDNBT.DRVD_XAAS_BKGS_KEY = NKM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY                                                   
                                 AND NKM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'XAAS'   
                                 AND CAST(NKM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE          AS TIMESTAMP(0)) > DJS.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE  AND   MTDNBT.BOOKING_PCT <> 100
                                 AND CAST(COALESCE(NKM.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,CURRENT_DATE) AS DATE) >=(SELECT  FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       
                                 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
                                 WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =200411)         
                 
/* END Q2FY18  XAAS */
 
 
UNION ALL
        
 
SELECT                                                                                  
 TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY                 AS DRVD_NCR_BKG_TRX_KEY /* Modified as part of OM LSS project*/
,TRX.TRANSACTION_DATETIME                                                                 AS TRANSACTION_DTM
,TRX.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT
,TRX.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE                                                      AS SS_CD
,TRX.PROCESS_DATE                                                                      AS PROCESS_DT
,TRX.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE                                                   AS BOOKINGS_PCT          
,TRX.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE                                                                              AS SPLIT_PCT     
 ,0.00                                                                      AS TRADE_IN_AMT          /* Modified as part of OM LSS project. this column is not present in MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX. Hence defaulting to 0*/
,TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER                                                           AS DD_AH_BK_SALES_REP_NUM               
 ,TRX.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE                                                               AS DD_AH_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD 
 ,TRX.DD_RMA_FLAG                                                                       AS DD_AH_RMA_FLG
,100-TRX.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE                                                         AS DV_AH_BKG_PCT
,TRX.DD_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG                                                AS DV_AH_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG                               
 ,TRX.DD_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG                                    AS DV_AH_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG                   
 ,TRX.DD_REVENUE_FLAG                                                                              AS  DV_AH_REVENUE_FLG
,TRX.DD_OVERLAY_FLAG                                                                              AS DD_AH_OVERLAY_FLG
,TRX.DD_IC_REVENUE_FLAG                                                       AS DV_AH_IC_REVENUE_FLG      
 ,TRX.DD_CHARGES_FLAG                                                                              AS DV_AH_CHARGES_FLG
,TRX.DD_MISC_FLAG                                                                      AS DV_AH_MISC_FLG
,TRX.DD_ACQUISITION_FLAG                                                     AS DV_AH_ACQUISITION_FLG    
 ,TRX.DD_SERVICE_FLAG                                                                                AS DV_AH_SERVICE_FLG
,TRX.DD_CORP_BKG_FLAG                                                           AS DD_AH_CORP_BKG_FLAG      
 ,NKM.CANCELLED_FLG                                                                                  AS DD_AH_CANCELLED_FLG
,TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT                                      AS DV_AH_COMP_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT                              
 ,TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT                                      AS DV_AH_COMP_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT                              
 ,TRX.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT                                         AS DV_AH_COMP_COST_USD_AMT                         
 ,TRX.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY                                   AS DV_AH_EXTENDED_QTY                         
 ,TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                                                        AS DD_AH_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
 ,TRX.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE                                                                 AS DD_AH_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD               
 ,NKM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT                    AS DD_AH_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT                                 
,TRX.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT                                                                      
,TRX.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT                                                                                
 ,'Fiscal Year'                                                       AS BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD    /* Modified as part of OM LSS project. this column is not present in MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX. Hence defaulting*/
,TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT                                                                          
 ,TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY                                                                                
 ,TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                                                  AS DD_AH_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY     
 ,TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                                                   AS DD_AH_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY      
 ,TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                                                                AS DD_AH_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    
 ,NKM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY                                                        AS DD_AH_END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
 
,-999  AS   PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
,TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                                                                        AS DD_AH_PRODUCT_KEY
,TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,USER                                                                                                                                                                    AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  )      AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER                                                                                                                                                                    AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)  )      AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,TRX.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG       /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
 ,TRX.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG              /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
 ,TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
 ,TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
 ,TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
 ,TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
 ,TRX.POB_TYPE_CD /* NRS MPOB Change */
 ,TRX.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /* NRS PI3 Change */
 ,NULL                                                                                                                                                                    AS ACTION_CODE
,'='  AS DML_TYPE
/*  ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18 */ 
,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
/* END Q2FY18 XAAS */
 
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_NRT_BKG_TRX  TRX                                                      /* Modified as part of OM LSS project*/                             
                                 CROSS JOIN                                                        
                                 (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$CTLDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='WF_W_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD') DJS
                                 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NKM                                                        
                                 ON  TRX.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NKM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY                                                   
                                 AND NKM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = 'ERP'   
                                 AND CAST(NKM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE          AS TIMESTAMP(0)) > DJS.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE  AND   TRX.BOOKINGS_PERCENTAGE <> 100
                                 AND CAST(COALESCE(NKM.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,CURRENT_DATE) AS DATE) >=(SELECT  FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       
                                 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
                                 WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT =200411)
